{{Quote|Oh yes, I worked for your father on an expedition years ago.|translated=1|Malare, to [[Bastila Shan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Malare''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who had been employed to serve as a governess for [[Bastila Shan]] before Shan was given to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a young girl. Many years later, Malare again encountered Shan while the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was traveling with the amnesiac former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], during their search for the [[Star Map]]s. In the conversation that followed, Malare told Bastila that her mother, [[Helena Shan|Helena]], was ill and that she was attempting to locate her daughter. When asked, the Twi'lek informed the party that the elder Shan was awaiting them in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], on the desert [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Behind the scenes==
Like many of the other side quest characters, Malare is randomly spawned on one of the planets that the player visits after the necessary game triggers have been activated; in this case, having Bastila Shan tell the player about her family in addition to arriving at a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] with Shan in the group. If the meeting occurs on Tatooine itself, Malare will simply state that Helena Shan is on that world and waiting.
